# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: "default"
    type: "compute.v1.network"
    properties:
      description: "Network for our three-tier application"
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true

  - name: "subnet-1"
    type: "compute.v1.subnetwork"
    properties:
      description: "First subnetwork in the VPC network"
      ipCidrRange: "10.240.16.0/20"
      region: "us-central1"
      network: "$(ref.default.selfLink)"
      
  - name: "subnet-2"
    type: "compute.v1.subnetwork"
    properties:
      description: "Second subnetwork in the VPC network"
      ipCidrRange: "10.240.32.0/20"
      region: "us-central1"
      network: "$(ref.default.selfLink)"      

  - name: "subnet-3"
    type: "compute.v1.subnetwork"
    properties:
      description: "Third subnetwork in the VPC network"
      ipCidrRange: "10.240.48.0/20"
      region: "us-central1"
      network: "$(ref.default.selfLink)"
